item.title: 测试文本
item.description:
# Exam Review Sample
This file is a quick smoke test for the reader.
## Key Points
- Use **bold** for high-priority facts. - Use *italic* for emphasis. - Use `inline code` for terms or formulas. - Use ==highlight== for material that needs another pass.
> A short quote block is useful for definitions or examiner wording.
## Checklist
- [x] Import Markdown - [x] Generate outline - [ ] Review weak topics
## Table
| Topic | Priority | Note | | -------- | -------- | ----------------------- | | Concepts | High | Read twice | | Practice | Medium | Time-box each set | | Errors | High | Summarize every mistake |
## Links And Images
[Cloudflare Pages](https://pages.cloudflare.com/) opens in a new tab.
![Sample image](https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1456513080510-7bf3a84b82f8?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80)
## Code Block
```js const review = ['read', 'recall', 'practice']; console.log(review.join(' -> ')); ```。
